recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you register for anything new?
recent_60_samples.answer: I signed up for the writing class.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your friend want to know?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether the seats stayed empty.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you all set with the club?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not paid the club dues yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You looked stressed after class today.
recent_60_samples.answer: I wanted to know if the deadline had passed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear about the schedule change?
recent_60_samples.answer: You didn't mention the class moved to Friday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get into that elective?
recent_60_samples.answer: The class you wanted filled up before Monday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you coming to the library later?
recent_60_samples.answer: I can't make it to the study group tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you sorted out your fall electives?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not decided whether to take the class that meets Fridays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear the news about our seminar?
recent_60_samples.answer: The seminar was rescheduled because the room that we booked became unavailable.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you call the box office?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked if the tickets were left.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you check the fitness center hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the gym opened early.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you ready for the discussion?
recent_60_samples.answer: I finished the whole reading before class.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you take the bus this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wasn't sure whether the shuttle still ran.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you settle on a dining plan?
recent_60_samples.answer: You picked the meal plan with weekend brunch.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm still working on the last slide.
recent_60_samples.answer: Did you finish the group project on time?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you submit the paper already?
recent_60_samples.answer: I turned in the essay right before the deadline.

recent_60_samples.prompt: When does the library shut on weekends?
recent_60_samples.answer: The main library closes early on Friday nights.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you joining the gym program?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not signed up for the fitness orientation.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ever settle the credit question?
recent_60_samples.answer: I never found out whether the elective that replaced it still counts.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you end up going on the excursion?
recent_60_samples.answer: I would have joined the trip if the fee had been lower.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ever find your keys?
recent_60_samples.answer: I lost my keys near the gym.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear anything about the exam results?
recent_60_samples.answer: She said the results were already posted online.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you ready for tomorrow's seminar?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't finished the reading assignment yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You had the agenda at the last meeting.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where did you put the printed meeting agenda?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you use the tutoring center much?
recent_60_samples.answer: He wanted to know if the tutoring center opens Saturdays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you catch the announcement about office hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: I heard the statistics professor moved her office hours.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You needed to turn in those forms.
recent_60_samples.answer: I dropped off the signed permission forms at the front desk yesterday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you submit the application on time?
recent_60_samples.answer: They found out the deadline had already passed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You mentioned the shuttle was late again.
recent_60_samples.answer: How long did you wait for the campus shuttle?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know why the hall is locked?
recent_60_samples.answer: I think it's been reserved for the evening rehearsal.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you still need that biology workbook?
recent_60_samples.answer: I saw the bookstore restocked the biology workbooks today.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to the professor about timing?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've been wondering whether the deadline could be extended.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Can you still pay with a meal ticket?
recent_60_samples.answer: I noticed the vending machine doesn't accept paper tickets anymore.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You finally sorted out your schedule.
recent_60_samples.answer: Which elective did you register for this term?

recent_60_samples.prompt: I need to print something before class.
recent_60_samples.answer: He mentioned the printer on the third floor broke.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get any notice about the new times?
recent_60_samples.answer: You should read the email that announced the schedule change.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You met with your advisor yesterday.
recent_60_samples.answer: The academic counselor recommended that I retake the placement test next semester.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you been to the gym lately?
recent_60_samples.answer: He wondered about the gym schedule after the repairs.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You said you'd swing by the writing center.
recent_60_samples.answer: What time does the writing center close today?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you receive anything from the housing office?
recent_60_samples.answer: I think the orientation packet was mailed to every new student.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know about the writing center hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether the writing center was open.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish your section of the group work?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not finished my part of the project.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know the shuttle's evening schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: I want to know when the shuttle stops running.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you in any study groups this term?
recent_60_samples.answer: I joined the study group that meets on Thursday nights.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you grab your books from the hold shelf?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't picked up my library books yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You mentioned changing your schedule.
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked my advisor whether I could switch into the seminar next term.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you been to the third floor lately?
recent_60_samples.answer: The reading room on the third floor reopened to students after the long renovation.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You look like you're heading to the library.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I return my library book?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you free to grab lunch later?
recent_60_samples.answer: I'm meeting my lab partner at the science center.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hand in your paperwork?
recent_60_samples.answer: I dropped off the forms at reception.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Julian want to know from you?
recent_60_samples.answer: He asked whether the printers on our floor worked.

recent_60_samples.prompt: When did you get your parking pass?
recent_60_samples.answer: I picked up my parking pass this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where do you like to study best?
recent_60_samples.answer: I find the east reading room quieter than the lounge.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You look like you're rushing somewhere.
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out when the shuttle stops running tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you put the projector?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've already returned the projector to the desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know where advising is now?
recent_60_samples.answer: I heard the advising office moved to the second floor.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Alison ask you about the class?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know whether the seminar had been moved again.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get into the writing workshop?
recent_60_samples.answer: The writing workshop that the department offered was canceled last week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you get your papers back so fast?
recent_60_samples.answer: The final research essays were graded by two different instructors this week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you discover about your schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: I realized that my course registration had not gone through yet.
